tweets.full_text:
We're reducing the price of our top-tier Google AI Ultra plan from $250 to $200/mo AND introducing a new $100/mo Ultra plan tier.

This new plan unlocks 5x higher usage limits to Gemini app than the Pro plan so you can accelerate your coding and creativity. It also includes early https://t.co/LyZIbzXOV0

media.ext_alt_text:
A promotional graphic for "Google AI Ultra" with the text "Starting at $100/month".

Below the heading are six feature badges: Google Antigravity, Gemini 3.5 Flash, 5x Gemini App limits vs. Pro plan, Google Flow, YouTube Premium, and 20TB Storage.

The bottom half shows a conceptual visualization of an AI workflow connected by glowing digital lines, with labels for "Review Build" and "Agent Manager." On the left is a coding interface with a prompt box that reads, "Turn my sketch into a working webpage. Invoked designer subagent," featuring a simple sketch of a vase. On the right, connected by the glowing lines, is the generated result: a polished e-commerce webpage mockup displaying 3D renders of the blue vase with shopping cart UI elements.
